route.name: The Great San Diego Triathlon
route.description: Public GPX San Diego County route with mixed bikepacking terrain and complex backcountry logistics.
route.surfaceMix: Public GPX San Diego County route with mixed bikepacking terrain and complex backcountry logistics.
route.bestSeason: Cooler months are more appropriate; July heat blocks a normal next-weekend promotion.

difficultyProfile.surface: Public GPX San Diego County route with mixed bikepacking terrain and complex backcountry logistics.
difficultyProfile.traffic: review paved connectors and trailhead access
difficultyProfile.technical: moderate unless source notes say otherwise

resources.water: Backcountry water and heat exposure require conservative planning.
resources.food: Carry food and verify any town/service stops.
resources.toiletsShowers: Use mapped waypoints and land-manager pages; confirm current operation before departure.
resources.bikeShops: Identify nearest shops and exact hours during final trip refresh.
resources.longestGap: Measure from imported GPX and source POIs before ride-ready promotion.
resources.mosquitoes: Seasonal; check recent reports for camp and water-adjacent sections.

tips: Keep as a future cool-season SoCal route.
Do not promote for next weekend.
Only revisit with current water and heat plan.

verification.notes: Public GPX imported and parsed locally. Final legal/resource checks still control ride-ready promotion.

mapQuality.reviewRule: Route line is imported from public GPX and suitable for planning review.

review.decision: reject/rework; public GPX exists but access-issue waypoints, Cleveland NF restrictions, active Range Fire, and exact-camp gaps block next-weekend promotion
blockers: Current July 10-13 screening blocks ride-ready promotion. Keep as planning/reference only.
Public GPX contains access-issue waypoints that are not officially resolved.
Cleveland NF Elevated Fire Use Restrictions and active San Diego County Range Fire block next-weekend promotion.
Informal GPX camp notes are not legal public campground confirmations.
requiredFixes: Resolve the July-window blocker or choose a different route.
Resolve the GPX access-issue waypoints using official land-manager/property-access sources.
Overlay the route against Cleveland NF road/trail closures, Orosco Ridge closures, and Cuyamaca Rancho bike-legal trails.
Replace informal camp waypoints with specific legal campgrounds/lodging and verify exact July 10-13 availability.
openQuestions: Do current closures/fire/weather alter the imported GPX?

promotionChecklist.targetWindowNote: San Diego backcountry/desert heat and multi-sport logistics block next-weekend promotion.
promotionChecklist.officialGeometryNote: Official/public GPX has been imported and parsed locally.
promotionChecklist.closuresFireWeatherNote: Cleveland NF has High fire danger and elevated fire-use restrictions; CAL FIRE lists active Range Fire in San Diego County.
promotionChecklist.legalAccessNote: GPX includes explicit access-issue waypoints and needs official overlay against Cleveland NF roads/trails, Cuyamaca Rancho, Cedar Creek/Three Sisters Falls access, and private/public boundary issues.
promotionChecklist.finalDecisionNote: Source-backed route remains planning-grade; target-window blockers prevent ride-ready promotion only.
